title: radiko android v8.4.3 with geo-bypass patch
description:
This is a split APK. You can install it using an app such as [SAI](https://f-droid.org/packages/com.aefyr.sai.fdroid/).

---
https://radiko.jp/ is the central platform for Japanese radio.

I had an AI patch the radiko app to give it fake GPS values, the same as the [rajiko browser extension](https://github.com/jackyzy823/rajiko) does on desktop.
So, you can listen to the ラジオ on your phone outside of Japan, without using a mock location app and being pestered to enable location accuracy. (and you can still use Google maps etc at the same time)
I also had it intercept the app's location switch button, so you can change region by picking from a list.

Синносукэ Томари — бывший элитный полицейский из столичной полиции, которого после инцидента, оставившего одного из его коллег инвалидом, «понизили» в должности и перевели в отдел специальных расследований. Этот отдел занимается расследованием странных происшествий в городе, в частности недавних событий, получивших название «Сдвиг плотности». Эти события, которые в народе называют «замедлением», приводят к тому, что люди не могут двигаться. Когда Драйв Драйвер и Тридорон выбирают его, Шинноске превращается в Камен Райдера Драйва, и ему поручают сразиться с Ройдмудами, которые планируют восстать против человечества и захватить мир. ©

|*Avid bookworm and college student Motosu Urano ends up dying in an unforeseen accident. This came right after the news that she would finally be able to work as a librarian as she had always dreamed of. When she regained consciousness, she was reborn as Myne, the daughter of a poor soldier. She was in the town of Ehrenfest, which had a harsh class system. But as long as she had books, she didn't really need anything else. However, books were scarce and belonged only to the nobles. But that doesn't stop her, so she makes a decision... "If there aren't any books, I'll just create some."*|

| Synopsis | Conditions for Receiving Bounty: Bring the brain of a wanted criminal possessing illegal Somadea to the authorities.Whether the target is alive or dead...is irrelevant.The year is 2099. Humanity has advanced, overcoming all injuries and illnesses with the development of the Medical Android Technology "Somadea." However, along with the development of Somadea, crimes misusing said technology have rapidly increased.Somadea grants physical abilities far superior to those of normal flesh and blood, and by illegally modifying it, Somadea can be misused for criminal purposes. To deal with these Somadea crimes, the government established the Bounty Hunter System. Civilians registered as bounty hunters are permitted to kill illegal Somadea users designated as wanted criminals by the police. In return, they are rewarded with large amounts of bounty money.In this unforgiving world, Ubu Kamigori makes a living hunting down criminals as a bounty hunter. But one day, when she returns home from a job, she finds the man with whom she has a sordid history waiting there—Mr. Elegance. And so, her destiny begins to unravel.A tale woven by mechanical girls and the smell of gunpowder smoke, this suspenseful action begins! |

title: Hatsune Miku "Magical Mirai 2026" SP - Kotoshi mo Zessan Seisakuchuu (TVer 1920x1080 x264 AAC)
description:
![](https://files.catbox.moe/2xwaf1.webp)

『初音ミク「マジカルミライ」』は、初音ミクたちバーチャルシンガーの3DCGライブと、創作の楽しさを体感できる企画展を併催したイベントです。初音ミクたちのファンが国内外から集まり、一堂に会する大型イベントとして、2013年から毎年開催し、13年間で累計58万人以上を動員しました。
2026年は7-8月に開催。恒例のOSAKA（インテックス大阪）、TOKYO（幕張メッセ 国際展示場）に、「マジカルミライ」初のHAMAMATSU（アクトシティ浜松）を加えた3都市で開催します。
この特別番組では、HAMAMATSUでの取材映像や関係者・クリエイターの独占インタビュー、イベントの最新情報をお届け。
これまでの企画展やライブのダイジェスト映像なども交え、盛りだくさんの内容でお送りします。

Original broadcast: TOKYO MX on 2025.05.31

![](https://files.catbox.moe/n3ip2t.jpg)

◇番組内容
米花町で多発する連続宝石強盗事件を知った歩美は、夢中になっているアニメ・プリキュアのストーリーと重ね合わせ、「盗賊団が現れればプリキュアに会える」と張り切る。次の標的と噂される金子宝石店で、コナンたち少年探偵団は警備をすることに。怪しい客を尾行し、犯行の決行日とアジトを突き止めたことで、警察が盗賊団を一網打尽にしたかに思えたが、歩美はある違和感に気付く……。探偵団はキュアット解決できるのか！？

**Описание:**
Никто не хочет видеть «Грязного собирателя» Радда в своей команде искателей приключений. Его прозвище — и его зловоние — связаны с его постоянными походами в Ядовитый лабиринт за лекарственными травами; он выживает в этой работе только благодаря навыку «Иммунитет к статусам». Когда его наконец нанимают в качестве носильщика в отряд, кажется, что дела пойдут на поправку… Пока не появляется смертоносное подземельное чудовище, и его мнимые союзники не используют его в качестве приманки, а затем не бросают на произвол судьбы! Раненый, обездоленный и едва выживший после нападения, Радд нарушает запретное табу, чтобы остаться в живых: он начинает есть монстров. Но чем больше он пожирает, тем больше силы он обретает, давая старт захватывающему, полному приключений гастрономическому фэнтези!

Ну а там возможность бесконечно генерировать готовую еду и прочие полезные вещи быстро находит своё применение…

title: [9901-RAW][岩窟王][GANKUTSUOU][BDRIP][1080P][3Audio][V2]
description:
![这是图片替代文本](https://images.plurk.com/6dAd0lsEmEDPbuG3A1yD.jpg)
音轨语言：日、英、法
AUDIO LANGUAGE : JAPANESE / ENGLISH / FRENCH
处理了十几版，感觉始终是会顾此失彼，因为这部片的蓝光碟蕴含很多瑕疵，每处理一个问题就会影响到画面的另一个部分，甚至有些因为动画制作公司后期摄影的低质量处理，导致画面上有效细节非常少（这种我是无能为力去处理的），最终压制参数迭代多次就产生出目前这个v2的版本。相对来说折中的强化了清晰度，并且尽量清理了画面上的各种锐化白边，还有各种疯狂的banding/blocking/noising。不过因为本片是碟片制作方使用不太先进的拉伸手法从720p拉到1080p，线条的锯齿感十分强，尽管我做了抗锯齿，偶尔还是可以看得出来。
v2版本和v1的最大区别是，线条和纹理清晰度更好，角色的色彩描边损失减少，但是清晰的代价可能是线条本身的低质拉伸感也会明显一点，喜欢哪个版本请自己下载1集后对比选择。
我提供的字幕版本为简体中文字幕，由popgo字幕组译制，如果繁体用户出现乱码可以尝试用繁化姬进行转化。

title: [Kekkan] Jishou Akuyaku Reijou na Konyakusha no Kansatsu Kiroku. - S01E10 (WebRip 1080p AV1 Multi-Subs Aliciä) / 自称悪役令嬢な婚約者の観察記録。 / An Observation Log of My Fiancée Who Calls Herself a Villainess / 10 / (Weekly)
description:
Your average Tia.  
![Your Lady Bertia](https://i.imgur.com/Fw4hZkW.png)  

---

This is a high effort filtering and encoding for *Jishou Akuyaku Reijou na Konyakusha no Kansatsu Kiroku.*  
**slow.pics compare:** [https://slow.pics/c/0H6kLeie](https://slow.pics/c/0H6kLeie)  

This anime is quite harsh and has a lot of issues.  
For filtering, as usual, we first merge the OP using `vsdenoise.frequency_merge`.  
After that, we use a `MVTools` based processing focusing on two issues: stablising the heavy grain in the source and stabilising the flickering lineart in panning scenes. In order to fix the flickering and also maximise encoder detail retention, we choose `MotionMode.COHERENCE` for caculating MVs. For blocks with no valid MVs, we use a tuned `DFTTest` + `bm3d` to denoise. At last, to prevent removing too much noise in flashback scenes, we protect the processing with a frame mask made from `MVTools.mask` and `std.PlaneStats`.  

This anime has fairly strong aliasing and halo, and even chroma halo, but unfortunately it's not descalable.  
We use `EEDI2` via `vsTAAmbk.TAAmbk` and a `gaussian` based method via `fmtc.resample` to AA.  
For dehalo, on luma, we use `vsdehalo.dehalo_alpha` to dehalo, protected by mask created via `vsdehalo.fine_dehalo.mask` and a `bilateral` based protection. On chroma, we perform a light dehalo using `vsdehalo.edge_cleaner`, protected by mask created via `vsdehalo.fine_dehalo.mask`.  

For encoding, we use latest May 26 version of 5fish/SVT-AV1-PSY. We use `--lineart-psy-bias 3 --texture-psy-bias 4` as a base, while setting `--noise-psy-bias 2 --texture-ac-bias 3.0 --texture-energy-bias 1.10`, making it halfway to `--texture-psy-bias 5`. For `--crf`, we use `--crf 24.80` for this encode, and we also set `--high-quality-encode-psy-bias 1`. At last, to minimise unpleasant ringing caused by the remaining noise after filtering, we use `--psy-bias-sharpness-rounding 52`.  
We add a decently coarse layer of Simplex noise via a custom photon noise table to the encode.  

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me, pointing out issues, and giving me advice.  

If you're interested in AV1 encoding for anime, you are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).  

You are welcome to do anything with this encode, including remuxing and republishing it. However, we would ask you to leave a credit to Kekkan if you can.

因成为了公寓邻居而开始交流的藤宫周与椎名真昼，在高中二年级的运动会结束后，终于正式交往。

无论是亲手制作的料理还是浴衣约会，两人间充满了如新婚夫妻般的氛围，但那份怦然心动的感觉却依然让他们不知所措。

这段甜蜜却又令人心痒难耐的恋爱物语，仍将继续——

**STORY :**

订阅突破1000万人的TOP级主播少女超绝最可爱天使酱——人称「超天酱」，没有一天看不到她活跃的身影。互联网、电视节目、LIVE……她总是活在粉丝们的欢呼声中。
有一个3位少女组成的主播组合将超天酱视为目标，其名为“卡拉马佐夫”。
而在与这群主播们的活动相去甚远之处，有一位与小白脸男友同居、在主题咖啡店工作的少女——卡茜。
星星般闪耀的少女，与追求星星光芒的少女们共同谱写，令世人着迷的“互联网天使”的故事与屏幕另一端的“你”的故事在此拉开帷幕——

订阅突破1000万人的TOP级主播少女超绝最可爱天使酱——人称「超天酱」，没有一天看不到她活跃的身影。互联网、电视节目、LIVE……她总是活在粉丝们的欢呼声中。

title: [Orphan] Space Fantasia 2001 Nights (LD)
description:
Orphan (and friends) present a new version of the 1987 "hard" sci-fi OVA *Space Fantasia 2001 Nights*. The OVA uses three chapters from Hoshino Yokunobu's manga *2001 Nights* to tell the story of the settlement of colony planet Ozma in the Tau Ceti system, 11.9 light years from Earth.

1. *Orphans of Space*. Earth sends a "seed ship", containing genetic material from the Robinson family, to Tau Ceti, in hopes of find a viable planet for colonization.

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEh3u91u04nb59_6s8RuPe9g8uX8wlJg3HFSJcbjaEHRMHl1yN70iC6KtQ4yHezNVBXe1eLnHu-Qj7NIJClhJ8tcQCz0FNtxSOIvdPsMYqHAwzpdJILZm90ix5gZR6MxeD5KxBJHztUsrE3WrhZLXVdsgYP_VoI8PL2u9jXwvZRRDGSJoqWY_5O8yYK9QnSq/s738/Space%20Fantasia%202001%20encode_001_16332.png)

2. *A Gift From Earth*. The invention of FTL spaceflight allows the Robinson's son, Adam Jr, to beat the seed ship to Ozma and terraform it into an Earth-like planet.

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEhTswoKL-5xGpAtc6oJgYUUw3gp8zLo699rhPRmtzt9aFspk9CddmiJY0_8kNAPEh-jc2vZpPVlPQKkFAZbqpRv3lWT0u5tZxvy9KTGGD3YgzuaWjyaqWEGuyzuSrKhfbdHzu9SHb-lGLqfbyavvzjQmITvcOhl0cUtw0ZWm0tL5i3KEGZK5sMIGE4NS-j4/s738/Space%20Fantasia%202001%20encode_001_80438.png)

3. *The Songs of Distant Earth*. After most colonies have collapsed, Adam Jr leads a last band of colonists to Ozma, where he will meet his long-lost brothers and sisters.

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEhjeDElK93K4U9AuFcQ0iIDvZG0c3bFxO2CiBuxCEL-1Pi1SOKyLWr-evIMyTzkggNitvuEPprF7OATAWZgcjSz-wEJlxiiRZf8_IZlLkhQKUQK3UMKLm6Y8R9W8VFgNDRSU-Qxp-h9JCsZLPx5pxKtciBHaFIPCoaXL25cpVjLgsn2m4agTLqliCP2LUBt/s738/Space%20Fantasia%202001%20encode_001_138872.png)

The original subs were by Kanjisub and Shinsen-Subs (SHS). Perevolildo and Darkonius both checked the translation. Perevodildo and I both worked on the (small number of) signs. I edited. VigorousJammer and Uchuu QCed. The encode is by WOWmd, from a laserdisc provided by Batty. See [this blog entry](https://collectr.blogspot.com/2026/06/space-fantasia-2001-nights.html) for more details.

Some Q&A:

Q: Why a laserdisc instead of a DVD?
A: Ask WOWmd.

Q: Why is the encode so huuuuuge?
A: Ask WOWmd.

Hope that helps.

I really enjoyed this show and, after nearly twenty years, it deserves another look. I hope you'll like it too.

***

**Год выхода:** 2026
**Жанр:** повседневность, комедия
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 08 из 12

**Описание:**

Однажды Мейко Мориту, старшеклассницу из Акиты, выбирают для перевода в престижную женскую академию Амамия. Испытывая одновременно волнение и тревогу по поводу новой жизни в Токио, Мейко переезжает в город — и обнаруживает, что её ждёт манга-кафе под названием «Ёжик»! Кафе также служит студенческим общежитием, где Мейко живёт и трудится в рамках обязательной общественной работы, вместе с целой плеядой эксцентричных обитателей.

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide

EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア

**Android**

- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

以下の内容に興味がある方は、[このPastebin](https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV)に記載のメールアドレスへご連絡ください：

- 購入した漫画の保存方法を学びたい方

title: [Some-Stuffs] Pocket Monsters (2023) 001-136 (1080p HEVC 10-bit) [Batch] (PM23 | PM2023 | Pokemon 2023 | Pokémon Horizons The Series)
description:
![She used to be so grumpy <3](https://files.catbox.moe/ijy84s.png)
To avoid running into problems playing any of our releases, [please use mpv!](https://iamscum.wordpress.com/guides/videoplayback-guide/)
Get the most up-to-date subs for this project [here](https://github.com/Toa-of-Gallifrey/Fansubs/tree/main/Pocket%20Monsters).
This release includes two sub tracks: default “eng” with no honorifics (Mr. Friede), and “enm” with honorifics (Friede-san). Please set your media player preferences accordingly.
[Comp](https://slow.pics/c/K80Nx2QW)

Translation: bluesun
Editing: Trıp
Timing: Tim, Felicity, Toa of Gallifrey
Typesetting: Toa of Gallifrey
Quality Check: Toa of Gallifrey

Logo font by [Sliter](https://twitter.com/SliterKitsune)

The long-delayed batch is finally out, and it took long enough that the whole Rakua saga concluded, so it's all included! This batch includes:

Liko and Roy Set Off (001-025)
The Gleam of Terapagos (026-045)
Terastal Debut (046-067)
Rekkuuza Rising (068-089)
Mega Voltage (090-111)
Episode: Mega Evolution (112-114)
Rising Again (115-136)

As well as the following extras:

New Year 2024 Special (brand new release!)
Pokémon GO Collab shorts
LikoRoy Channel
Audio Dramas
Ghost Rhyme MV
Cute Li'l Sango's Totally Awesome Drawing Song
Episode 111 and 114 Next Episode Previews

All extras use the same video in both torrents.

All episodes and most extras have received changes. There's a couple additional extras we wanted to include but we didn't want to delay this any longer, so look forward to them in the final PM23 series batch!

Changes include consistency changes, typesetting improvements, corrections, and some extra QC. Some episodes use new encodes. Episode 130 initially aired with a production error (an incorrect line read) that got corrected some days later, and our new release uses corrected audio from a fresh rip with the subtitle for the line changed to reflect the correction.

The New Year 2024 Special only includes one sub track with honorifics, and is minimally typeset.

Patch for the episodes that don't use new encodes (001-045, 071-136) available [here](https://mega.nz/file/bKYjRCIS#Y2Wt7tX-wrwepMs8LUt_tWnVXjGuB8zS9uNPSkKCBhY).
Patch for the extras that don't use new video (LikoRoy Channel 01-10) available [here](https://mega.nz/file/OSowGLiZ#zbpOMuNlGlkVZ0UQb7LqysHe5lqTtmrfXqjDkIYBz-Y).

Concierge soon!

title: [LPF] Devil Survivor 2: The Animation 01-13 (HDTV 720p x264 AAC)
description:
This torrent contains the whole Devil Survivor 2 series (episodes from 1 to 13) with spanish subtitles by Lonely Princess no Fansub. This version includes hardcoded subtitles into the video, with colored fonts for the main characters, karaokes and translations for the different songs and signs or significant on-screen elements across the series.

Audio: Japanese
Subtitles: Spanish (Spain)
Resolution: 1280x720 (HDTV)

Synopsis

The countdown to extinction begins on Sunday with the arrival of the Septentriones, otherworldly invaders set on the eradication of mankind. Caught in the crossfire, Hibiki Kuze and his friends join in the war for humanity's survival by signing contracts with demons to become "Devil Summoners." Soon, their abilities attract the attention of JP's, an underground agency led by Yamato Houtsuin. Once recruited into JP's, Hibiki and his friends fight and bond alongside other ordinary citizens who are Devil Summoners.

However, with each new day, another Septentrione appears to wreak havoc upon Japan. Even if many lives are lost in the process, before that night ends, the young summoners must defeat the invaders at all costs.

The story follows Arcana Famiglia, a self-appointed organization with mysterious powers that has protected a small Mediterranean island from pirates, foreign countries, and other threats. She is one of the rare humans who can see and communicate with fairies, although almost no one believes her in this day and age. But Lydia s quiet country life is turned upside down when Edgar J. C. Ashenbert, who claims to be royalty, hires her for her fairy expertise. She joins his quest for an invaluable magic sword, traveling from the United Kingdom to the Fairy World in this adventurous romantic fantasy.

Ryousuke Hazuki is a young man whose heart has been stolen away, stopping by the local floral shop daily in order to catch a glimpse of the beautiful Rokka Shimao, the shop's owner. In hopes of getting close to her, he decides to get a part-time job at the shop, but before he is able to make his move, he runs into a major roadblock: in her apartment dwells a ghost who claims to be Rokka's deceased husband.

Atsushi Shimao has quietly watched over his widowed wife ever since he passed three years ago. However, Hazuki is the first person to ever notice him, and the two quickly find themselves at odds: the jealous Shimao attempts to thwart the suitor's advances and possess his body, while Hazuki simply wants the ghost to pass on for good, allowing Rokka to move on from the past and him to be with the one he loves. As both men refuse to let go of their desires, an unusual relationship forms between a troubled woman, an unrelenting ghost, and a stubborn man in love.
